OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The token of the user who represents the connector in the OpenCTI platform.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: The scope or type of data the connector is importing, either a MIME type or Stix Object (for information only).

CONNECTOR_TYPE.description: Should always be set to INTERNAL_ENRICHMENT for this connector.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: Determines the verbosity of the logs.

CONNECTOR_AUTO.description: Enables or disables automatic enrichment of observables for OpenCTI. Keep disabled for this quota-based paid source to avoid depleting API credits.

OSINT_INDUSTRIES_API_KEY.description: API key used to authenticate requests to the OSINT Industries service.

OSINT_INDUSTRIES_BASE_URL.description: Base URL of the OSINT Industries API.

OSINT_INDUSTRIES_TLP_LEVEL.description: Traffic Light Protocol (TLP) level applied to the objects imported into OpenCTI. Results contain personal data; a restrictive TLP is recommended.

OSINT_INDUSTRIES_PREMIUM.description: If enabled, queries additional premium modules. This consumes more API credits.
